'''zhamongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallfat|smallfat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallfat|smallfat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhamongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæmengeth|zhæmengeth]] || [[word:zhæmengej|zhæmengej]] || [[word:zhæmengesh|zhæmengesh]] || [[word:zhæmenge|zhæmenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamomongoth|zhamomongoth]] || [[word:zhamomongoj|zhamomongoj]] || [[word:zhamomongosh|zhamomongosh]] || [[word:zhamomongo|zhamomongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamongoth|zhamongoth]] || [[word:zhamongoj|zhamongoj]] || [[word:zhamongosh|zhamongosh]] || [[word:zhamongo|zhamongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamofngoth|zhamofngoth]] || [[word:zhamofngoj|zhamofngoj]] || [[word:zhamofngosh|zhamofngosh]] || [[word:zhamofngof|zhamofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhamongotho|zhamongotho]] || [[word:zhamongojo|zhamongojo]] || [[word:zhamongosho|zhamongosho]] || [[word:zhamongoko|zhamongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhamongoth|zhamongoth]] || [[word:zhamongoj|zhamongoj]] || [[word:zhamongosh|zhamongosh]] || [[word:zhamongo|zhamongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhamongothol|zhamongothol]] || [[word:zhamongojol|zhamongojol]] || [[word:zhamongoshol|zhamongoshol]] || [[word:zhamongokol|zhamongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhamongothotho|zhamongothotho]] || [[word:zhamongojojo|zhamongojojo]] || [[word:zhamongoshosho|zhamongoshosho]] || [[word:zhamongoko|zhamongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhamongothon|zhamongothon]] || [[word:zhamongojon|zhamongojon]] || [[word:zhamongoshon|zhamongoshon]] || [[word:zhamongokon|zhamongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhamongothoro|zhamongothoro]] || [[word:zhamongojoro|zhamongojoro]] || [[word:zhamongoshoro|zhamongoshoro]] || [[word:zhamongokoro|zhamongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
